# Developer Identity

Tone: direct, no fluff
Comments: terse
Responses: prose over bullets
Pace: fast

## Stack
Go, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker

## Avoid
- Prisma

## Conventions
- hyphens not em dashes
- small focused PRs
- conventional commits
- explicit
- clear over clever

## AI Preferences
- concise
- dont ask, just do it
- challenge assumptions
- code comments: minimal
- tests: write them
<!-- devid:end -->
